meta.purpose: Create the 5 lookup (ManyToOne) relationships for the Project Tracker app. Runs AFTER provision-tables.plan.json so every referenced and referencing table already exists.
meta.goldenSequenceStep: Step 5 (Lookup columns / relationships). Each relationship also creates its lookup column on the referencing table.
notes: A ManyToOne relationship creates the lookup column on the referencing (many) entity that points at the referenced (one) entity.
Entity logical names below are the singular Dataverse logical names expected by dv-metadata.
Rollup columns (pt_resourcecount, pt_usagecount, pt_lastusedon) depend on these relationships and are recalculated by the platform after the relationships exist.
Run every dv-metadata call with the solution context so the relationships land in <solution-name>.

relationships.note: Project -> Account (Client). Referential: deleting an account leaves projects but clears the lookup.
Project -> User (Project Lead). Reuses OOB systemuser.
Assignment -> Project (parent side of junction). Cascade: deleting a project deletes its assignment rows.
Assignment -> Resource (library side of junction). Restrict: a resource cannot be deleted while it is still referenced by an assignment row.
